title: LLM Session Initialization & Switching
activity_flow: _load_mykeys: try import mykey (Python module) → if ImportError, read mykey.json → return dict of key/value pairs
_load_mykeys: raise Exception if neither mykey.py nor mykey.json found
'native' in k AND 'claude' in k → NativeClaudeSession(cfg) → NativeToolClient(session) → append to llm_sessions
'native' in k AND 'oai' in k   → NativeOAISession(cfg)    → NativeToolClient(session) → append to llm_sessions
'claude' in k (non-native)     → ClaudeSession(cfg)        → ToolClient(session)       → append to llm_sessions
'oai' in k (non-native)        → LLMSession(cfg)           → ToolClient(session)       → append to llm_sessions
'mixin' in k                   → store placeholder dict {'mixin_cfg': cfg} → append to llm_sessions
exception in any branch        → silently pass (skip)
for each entry in llm_sessions: if isinstance(s, dict) and 'mixin_cfg' in s:
MixinSession(all_sessions, cfg) — resolves llm_nos indices to backend references
MixinSession.__init__: assert all sessions are same group (Native or non-Native)
if first MixinSession._sessions[0] is NativeClaudeSession or NativeOAISession → NativeToolClient(mixin)
Compute new index: if n<0 → (llm_no+1) % len(llmclients), else n % len(llmclients)
If os.name != 'nt': replace 'powershell' → 'bash' in raw JSON string
key_conditions: Key name filter: must contain 'api' OR 'config' OR 'cookie' to be processed
Native vs non-native: 'native' substring in key name determines session base class
Claude vs OAI: 'claude' or 'oai' substring determines API protocol
Mixin validation: all sub-sessions must be same group (Native or non-Native)
CJK schema: model name contains 'glm', 'minimax', or 'kimi' → load _cn suffix schema
OS check: 'powershell' replaced with 'bash' on non-Windows only
class_relationships: BaseSession.__init__(cfg): sets api_key, api_base, model, context_win, history=[], proxy, timeouts, reasoning/thinking params
ClaudeSession extends BaseSession (Claude API, prompt-caching, SSE streaming)
LLMSession extends BaseSession (OpenAI-compatible, chat_completions or responses mode)
NativeClaudeSession extends BaseSession (adds tools, session_id, device_id, fake_cc_system_prompt)
NativeOAISession extends NativeClaudeSession (overrides raw_ask with OAI streaming)
ToolClient wraps any BaseSession: text-based tool protocol, last_tools optimization, _build_protocol_prompt
NativeToolClient wraps NativeClaudeSession/NativeOAISession: native tool calling, injects thinking_prompt as system
MixinSession: proxies attribute reads to _sessions[0], broadcasts system/tools/temperature/max_tokens/reasoning_effort to all sessions, implements retry+spring-back fallback
data_flow: mykey.py or mykey.json → _load_mykeys() → mykeys dict → GeneraticAgent.__init__
cfg dict (apikey, apibase, model, context_win, proxy, etc.) → BaseSession.__init__
llm_sessions list built incrementally; mixin resolved in second pass
next_llm transfers backend.history between clients to preserve conversation state
load_tool_schema updates global TOOLS_SCHEMA used by agent_runner_loop
important_notes: mykeys is lazy-loaded via llmcore module __getattr__; proxies derived from mykeys['proxy']
Session type detected purely from key name substrings ('native','claude','oai','mixin','api','config','cookie')
MixinSession._sessions[0] is shallow-copied; its raw_ask is monkey-patched to _raw_ask for fallback logic
NativeToolClient injects a thinking/summary protocol as system prompt on every set_system() call
ToolClient.last_tools optimization: if tools unchanged, sends short 'still active' message instead of full schema
load_tool_schema() called at module load AND after every next_llm() switch
MixinSession spring-back: after spring_back seconds (default 300), reverts to primary session
